name: Giant Spider

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as a climb speed] The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Sense
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

traits.name: Web (Recharge 5-6)
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as a ranged attack named 'Web'] In the source this is a Dexterity save (DC 11) with no attack roll, range 30/60 ft., and it recharges on 5-6; here it is modeled as a ranged attack carrying a DEX DC 11 restrained rider. The restrained target can escape with a DC 12 Strength check; the webbing (AC 10, 5 hp) is vulnerable to fire.

traits.name: Bite poison (paralysis on 0 HP)
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as extra poison damage on the bite] The bite's DC 11 Constitution save deals 2d8 poison damage (half on save). In the source, if this poison reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is stable but poisoned for 1 hour (even after regaining hp) and paralyzed while so poisoned; that 0-HP follow-on effect is not modeled.

strategy: Open with Web to restrain a target from range, then close and bite the entangled prey to deliver its poison.
